administrator_login.description: The administrator login for the PostgreSQL server.

administrator_login_password.description: Password for the PostgreSQL server administrator.

auto_grow_enabled.description: Determines if storage auto-grow is enabled.

create_mode.description: Specifies the mode to create the PostgreSQL server.

creation_source_server_id.description: The ID of the source server to create from.

name.description: The name of the PostgreSQL server.

postgresql_version.description: The version of the postgresql server.

public_network_access_enabled.description: Allows public network access to the server.

restore_point_in_time.description: The time to restore from during server creation.

sku_name.description: The SKU name for the server, defining its performance.

ssl_enforcement_enabled.description: Enforces SSL connection to the server.

ssl_minimal_tls_version_enforced.description: The minimum TLS version for SSL enforcement.

tags.description: A map of tags to assign to the resource.

resource_group_name.description: Name of the resource group that this resource will be created in.

location.description: Location that this resource will be created in. (e.g. eastus2, southeastasia)
